writing.task1:
Dear Property Manager
 I am writing to report that the building elevator has been unreliable for the past two weeks. For example, on 5/8 at 9:00 AM it stopped working during a delivery, and on 12/8 at 7:30 PM elderly residents had to climb several floors by stairs. These incidents have caused real difficulty for residents and service access. Could you please provide a clear timeline for the full repair and let us know what temporary measures (such as extra staff support or scheduled maintenance updates) can be arranged until the elevator is fixed
Thank you for your attention
writing.task2: I agree that universities should require a community service component for graduation because it helps students develop social responsibility and practical skills beyond the classroom. For example, when students volunteer in local health campaigns, they not only support the community but also gain teamwork and communication skills that benefit their future careers. Some argue that mandatory service may add stress to already busy students, but if universities provide flexible options and clear support, the benefits to both students and society outweigh the drawbacks
writing.task3: The line graph shows that all three methods led to gradual increases in weekly study time, but at different level. App+Tutor started highest (4 hours) and rose steadily to 6 hours by w6, showing the largest overall gain. App-only grew from 3 to around 4.1 hours, with slower progress and a slight dip in w5. Self-study reading stayed lowest, rising modestly from 2.8 to 3.9 hours. Overall, learners using a tutor consistently studied more, perhaps because scheduled sessions and personal guidance created stronger commitment, while app-only and reading methods relied more on self discipline
